this is the third time today, isn't it
bold of you to outsource decisions to flora
even the flower is tired of this
decision fatigue, or just plain laziness
plucking petals won't fix your commitment issues
imagine needing a daisy to make your choices
the universe didn't design petals for this
this petal did not consent to being your oracle
you could just flip a coin, like a normal person
the flower is judging you, quietly
